title: AIP Transparency Manifest (v1)
description: One signed entry in the per-archive transparency chain (ADR-0019, Phase 1A). Each manifest pins a snapshot of the archive's audit chain head and counts of derived artifacts, and is linked to the previous manifest by 'previous_manifest_hash'. The first manifest's previous_manifest_hash is 64 zeros. Manifests are signed ed25519 by the operator; receptors verify the signature against the operator's public key whose SHA-256(DER SPKI) must equal 'public_key_fingerprint'.

sequence.description: 0-based index in this archive's transparency chain.

previous_manifest_hash.description: manifest_hash of the previous manifest in this chain, or 64 zeros for sequence=0.

audit_chain_head_hash.description: entry_hash of the last audit entry covered by this manifest.

archive_manifest_hash.description: Hash of the archive's internal manifest.json at the time of publication.

audit_entry_count.description: Number of audit log entries covered by this manifest.

public_key_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hex of the DER SPKI of the operator's ed25519 public key.

signature_algorithm.description: Closed v1; future algorithms require a new manifest schema version.

signature.description: ed25519 signature over JCS(manifest minus 'manifest_hash' and 'signature'). 128 hex chars.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of JCS(manifest minus 'manifest_hash'). Recomputed by verifiers.

sha256HexOrZero.description: SHA-256 hex, OR 64 zeros for the first manifest's prev pointer.

iso8601UtcSeconds.description: ISO-8601 UTC, second precision, trailing 'Z'. No microseconds.
